section.heading: Military history fellowships

subsection.heading: Fellowships.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of the Army shall prescribe regulations under which the Secretary may award fellowships in military history of the Army to the persons described in subsection (b).

subsection.heading: Eligible Persons.—
subsection.chapeau: The persons eligible for awards of fellowships under this section are citizens and nationals of the United States who—

paragraph.content: are graduate students in United States military history;
have completed all requirements for a doctoral degree other than preparation of a dissertation; and
agree to prepare a dissertation in a subject area of military history determined by the Secretary.

subsection.heading: Regulations.—
subsection.chapeau: The regulations prescribed under this section shall include—

paragraph.content: the criteria for award of fellowships;
the basis for determining the amount of a fellowship; and
the total amount that may be awarded as fellowships during an academic year.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 102–484, div. A, title X, § 1076(a), Oct. 23, 1992, 106 Stat. 2511, § 4316; renumbered § 4317, Pub. L. 103–35, title II, § 201(b)(2)(A), May 31, 1993, 107 Stat. 98; renumbered § 7417, Pub. L. 115–232, div. A, title VIII, § 808(c)(1), Aug. 13, 2018, 132 Stat. 1839.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2018—Pub. L. 115–232 renumbered section 4317 of this title as this section.
1993—Pub. L. 103–35 renumbered section 4316 of this title as this section.

note.heading: Effective Date of 2018 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 115–232 effective Feb. 1, 2019, with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232, set out as a note preceding section 3001 of this title.
